STEP 6 OF 8 — YOUR INFORMATION
Who’s Behind the Clock?
Required to confirm your appointment and send your confirmation text.
Terms of Service Agreement

By scheduling an appointment, paying a deposit, or receiving services from Round The Clock Notary, you agree to the following terms and conditions in full.

Service Description

Round The Clock Notary provides mobile notary and remote online notarization services in accordance with Texas law.

Legal Advice Disclaimer

The notary public is not an attorney and does not provide legal advice.

Identification Requirements

All signers must present valid government-issued photo ID matching the document being notarized.

Deposit & Appointment Policy

Deposits are non-refundable if cancellation is less than 24 hours, signer fails to appear, or appointment cannot be completed due to missing ID or incomplete documents.

Travel Fees

Travel fees apply once the notary begins travel and are non-refundable.

Limitation of Liability

Liability is limited to the lesser of total fees paid or the notary E&O insurance limits.

No Call / No Show

If the notary is not contacted within 15 minutes of the scheduled appointment time, the appointment is a no-show and the deposit is forfeited.

Governing Law

This agreement is governed by Texas law. Disputes shall be mediated in Hood County, Texas.

I have read and agree to the Round The Clock Notary Terms of Service Agreement.
Your information is used only to prepare your quote and schedule your appointment.
